company: K&K Top Stop Market and Truck Stop

Confirmed via Yelp and 4RoadService; full-service independent truck stop established 1990.

Confirmed via ParkAdvisor and TruckMap; also historically listed as "Kingsport Truck Stop (Citgo)" at the same address.
